snippet.title: Focker-In-Law | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
The circle of trust just got bigger. Focker-In-Law is in theaters this Thanksgiving. 
 ______  

This November, comedy icon and Emmy winner Ben Stiller and two-time Oscar® winner Robert De Niro reunite, joined by Grammy winner and Oscar® nominee Ariana Grande, in Focker-In-Law, a new chapter in the blockbuster Meet the Parents franchise.
 
Written and directed by John Hamburg, who co-wrote the three previous Meet the Parents films, Focker-In-Law is produced by Oscar® nominee Jane Rosenthal and Robert De Niro for Tribeca Productions; Ben Stiller and Oscar® winner John Lesher for Red Hour Films; Emmy winner Jay Roach for Delirious Media; and John Hamburg for Particular Pictures.


Find Focker-In-Law on Instagram at https://www.instagram.com/fockerinlaw/
Follow Focker-In-Law on Facebook at  https://www.facebook.com/fockerinlaw/
Follow Focker-In-Law on X at https://twitter.com/fockerinlaw
Follow Focker-In-Law on TikTok at https://www.tiktok.com/@fockerinlaw
https://www.fockerinlaw.com 

Genre: Comedy
Cast: Robert De Niro, Ben Stiller, Ariana Grande, Owen Wilson, Blythe Danner, Teri Polo, Skyler Gisondo, Beanie Feldstein, Eduardo Franco
Written and directed by: John Hamburg
Producers:Jane Rosenthal, Robert De Niro, Ben Stiller, John Lesher, Jay Roach, John Hamburg

snippet.title: GODZILLA MINUS ZERO | First Look Teaser
snippet.description:
GODZILLA MINUS ZERO
VFX, Written, and Directed by Takashi Yamazaki
In theatres November 6
Follow @godzilla_toho and @GKIDSfilms for more updates!
godzillaminuszero.com

GODZILLA MINUS ZERO picks up in 1949, two years after the tumultuous events of Godzilla Minus One, and continues the story of the Shikishima family as they face an all-new calamity. Additionally confirmed out of CinemaCon, Ryunosuke Kamiki, the hero who faced Godzilla’s terror in Godzilla Minus One, returns as Koichi Shikishima, and is joined by Minami Hamabe as Noriko Oishi, who miraculously survived Godzilla’s first attack on Tokyo.

As a project Filmed For IMAX, GODZILLA MINUS ZERO was shot with high-definition digital cameras certified by IMAX, and optimized in sound and imagery unique to IMAX screens. Fans can look forward to seeing Godzilla presented to all new terrifying heights, making GODZILLA MINUS ZERO in a true cinematic event not to be missed.

snippet.title: Fuerza Regida - ANSIEDAD (Letra)
snippet.description:
♫ Fuerza Regida - ANSIEDAD (Letra)
⭐ Download/Stream: 

🎤 Letra: Fuerza Regida - ANSIEDAD

[Verso 1]
Otra vez otra en mi cama, qué puta ansiedad
Suena el timbre y tú en mi celular
Vieras qué agüite me da contestar
Tú no me entiendes ni me entenderás
Otra vez con pleitos, deja de pelear
Todo lo que hago es por ti nomás
Sabes que te amo, tú eres la especial
Las otras capillas pa' un rato nomás

[Coro]
Pero entiéndeme, mija
Es la vida de artista
Me la navego entre loquera

Válgame, Dios
Fuerza Regida
¿Cómo puedes, mija?

[Verso 2]

Nuevamente, concluimos, me quieres cambiar
La historia nunca va a acabar

Pero entiéndeme, mija
Es la vida de artista
Me la navego entre loquera, desvergue de güeras
Y nomás la ansiedad no se va

Come on

The King
Copy?

Para ti, "Hasta siempre te amaré" fue un refrán

Take me with you tomorrow

Take me with you tomorrow

Tomorrow, tomorrow

Tomorrow, tomorrow

Porque aún no sé cómo vivir sin tu amor

Para poder verte a horas no adecuadas

snippet.title: Black Cat: The Master Thief| Character Reveal Trailer | Marvel Rivals
snippet.description:
Cross her path and your luck runs out! 🍀

One of the world's premier thieves, Felicia Hardy glides across the battlefield with swift precision and a dancer's grace, ever ready to purloin an opponent's fortune. Those who meet the Black Cat's gaze should beware, as her omens never miss their mark!

Felicia Hardy is one of the most notorious thieves in the world. Once the Black Cat has her eyes on a prize, it's already as good as gone. This is one feline femme fatale you don't want to cross... because luck is always on her side!

The Black Cat was recruited by Wilson Fisk to infiltrate Doctor Strange's Sanctum Sanctorum and steal the Tablet of Life and Time. However, while Kingpin sought to harness its ancient power to counter Alchemax by making a deal with the Gilded Saint, she hatched a plan of her own to free his captives. Let the double cross commence!

Season 7.5 arrives on April 17, 2026

Keep your eyes on the prize, because this cat always lands on her feet.

snippet.title: Grupo Marca Registrada - El Rescate (Letra/Lyrics) ft. Junior H
snippet.description:
Grupo Marca Registrada - El Rescate ft. Junior H
Grupo Marca Registrada - El Rescate (Letra/Lyrics) ft. Junior H

📜 Letra / Lyrics: Grupo Marca Registrada, Junior H - El Rescate

[Letra de "El Rescate"]

[Verso 1: Fidel]
Ya me torcieron en la movida
Entré a un callejón y sin salida
Ya no tengo ni pa' dónde hacerme
De aquí no puedo moverme; me rodeó la policía

[Verso 2: Junior H]
Mi compa, aquí venimos llegando
Venimos varios a rescatarlo
Nomás cúbrase de los chingazos
En dos minutos llegamos, pero no me suelte el radio

[Pre-Coro: Fidel]
Compa, me cayó un ángel del cielo
No tiene balas el fierro, ya todas se me acabaron

[Coro: Junior H]
Ya venimos aquí en el crucero
Nomás póngase las pilas para que se suba al carro
Ahí dejo peleando a los muchachos y nosotros nos pelamos

[Interludio: Junior H & Fidel]
Eah
Pura Marca Registrada, compadre
Y con todo el power, mi compa Junior H
Puro pa' adelante, mi compa

[Verso 3: Fidel]
Ya le debo una y sin palabras
Por poco me tocaban las balas
Si no hubiera llegado su apoyo
Ya estuviera con San Pedro tocándole las campanas

[Verso 4: Junior H]
Compa, no hay de qué; para eso estamos
Mientras que se pueda, lo apoyamos
No me tumbaron ningún muchacho
No tenemos ni una baja, y los pintos no retacharon

[Pre-Coro: Fidel]
La verdad que estoy agradecido
Mañana le mando equipo para todos sus chavalos

[Coro: Junior H]
Usted no se preocupe, mi amigo
Lo hicimos por la amistad, pa' que vea que estamos al tiro
Firmes y a la orden, amigazo, y puede contar conmigo

[Outro]
Un aplauso
